name: LSASS Memory Access
description: Detects attempts to access the LSASS (Local Security Authority Subsystem Service) process memory using suspicious access masks or dumping techniques. Attackers often target LSASS to extract cached credentials, enabling lateral movement and privilege escalation. This rule should be investigated promptly, as legitimate software rarely requires direct LSASS memory access.
query:
event.code: 10 AND
winlog.event_data.TargetImage: *lsass.exe AND
winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess: (0x1fffff OR 0x1010 OR 0x1410 OR 0x143a) AND
NOT winlog.event_data.SourceImage: *MsMpEng.exe AND
NOT winlog.event_data.SourceImage: *agentbeat.exe AND
NOT winlog.event_data.SourceImage: *elastic-agent.exe AND
NOT process.executable: *agentbeat.exe AND
NOT process.executable: *elastic-agent.exe AND
NOT process.executable: *MsMpEng.exe
